title: ETL Data Pipeline with SQL
description: Comprehensive ETL pipeline built during Nackademin studies. Extracts, transforms, and loads data from multiple sources using SQL, with focus on data quality and performance optimization.

title: Power BI Dashboard Project
description: Interactive business intelligence dashboard created with Power BI for data visualization and analytics. Includes data connections, DAX calculations, and comprehensive reporting features.

title: Selenium Test Automation Framework
description: Comprehensive test automation framework built with Selenium WebDriver, Java, and TestNG. Features include page object model pattern, data-driven testing, cross-browser testing, and detailed reporting with Allure.

title: API Testing Suite with Postman
description: Complete REST API testing solution using Postman collections and Newman for CI/CD integration. Includes automated test execution, environment management, and comprehensive test reporting.

title: Database Testing & Data Validation
description: Automated database testing framework for validating data integrity, performance, and CRUD operations. Built with Python and SQL, includes test data management and cleanup automation.

title: BDD Cucumber Test Suite
description: Behavior-driven development test suite using Cucumber with Gherkin syntax. Enables collaboration between technical and non-technical stakeholders through readable test scenarios.
